recent_announcements.summary: TVS Motor Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Update to our earlier disclosure dated 15th May 2026 under Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 |SUBJECT: General Updates

The Exchange had sought clarification from Influx Healthtech Limited for the quarter ended 31-Mar-2026 with respect to Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. On basis of above the Company was required to clarify the following:   -1. Half Yearly figures not submitted by the Company The response of the Company is enclosed. |SUBJECT: Reply to Clarification- Financial results
Shree Renuka Sugars Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Director(s) of the company. |SUBJECT: Change in Director(s)
